tastes.text: A sense of spatial depth created by overlapping translucent layers receding into the background

Create an illusion of three-dimensional depth using overlapping geometric forms that appear to recede into space. Use colour gradients from warm foreground tones to cool background tones, with varying line weights to reinforce the sense of near and far. The overall effect should feel like looking through stacked panes of coloured glass.

iterations.baseCode: FD 100

variants.code: FD 100
variants.reason: A single line provides no depth, layering, or visual interest relative to the prompt.

variants.code:

REPEAT 120 [SETPC (1 + MOD REPCOUNT 14) FD 100 RT 121]
variants.reason: The dense moiré pattern creates a sense of structural depth, though the solid color lacks true transparency.

REPEAT 36 [SETPC (PICK [SKYBLUE CYAN BLUE]) REPEAT 2 [FD 100 RT 160 FD 100 RT 20] RT 10]

  ]

TO SCENE
  SETBG [5 5 15]
  LOCALMAKE "S 400
  LOCALMAKE "R 0
  LOCALMAKE "H 50
  
  ; Draw background to foreground to create depth
  REPEAT 60 [
    ; Calculate color: deep purples to bright cyans
    LOCALMAKE "RED :H / 2
    LOCALMAKE "GREEN :H / 4
    LOCALMAKE "BLUE 100 + (:H / 2)
    
    ; Add a "glow" by drawing slightly offset layers
    LAYER :S (LIST :RED :GREEN :BLUE) :R
    
    ; Transform for next layer
    LOCALMAKE "S :S * 0.94
    LOCALMAKE "R :R + 7
    LOCALMAKE "H :H + 3
    
    ; Move center slightly to create a curved tunnel effect
    PU
    SETHEADING :R
    FD :S / 40
    PD
  ]
END

TO HIGHLIGHTS
  PU SETXY 0 0 PD
  SETPW 2
  REPEAT 36 [
    SETPC [200 255 255]
    FD 10 BK 10
    RT 10
  ]
END

; Execution
HT
SCENE
HIGHLIGHTS
END

  SETPW :WEIGHT
  SETPC :COLOR
  REPEAT 4 [
    FD :SIZE
    RT 90
  ]
  REPEAT 2 [

TO DRAW_COMPOSITION
  CS HT SETBG [10 10 25]
  MAKE "LAYERS 45
  MAKE "START_SIZE 500
  MAKE "START_WEIGHT 14
  
  REPEAT :LAYERS [
    MAKE "I REPCOUNT
    
    ; Calculate Gradients
    ; Near (Warm): Red/Orange/Yellow
    ; Far (Cool): Deep Blue/Violet/Cyan
    MAKE "R (255 - (:I * 5.5))
    MAKE "G (160 - (:I * 3.5))
    MAKE "B (:I * 5)
    
    IF :R < 0 [MAKE "R 0]
    IF :G < 0 [MAKE "G 0]
    IF :B > 255 [MAKE "B 255]
    
    ; Perspective calculations
    MAKE "CURRENT_SIZE (:START_SIZE * (POWER 0.92 :I))
    MAKE "CURRENT_WEIGHT (:START_WEIGHT * (POWER 0.90 :I))
    
    ; Positioning to create a receding tunnel effect
    PU
    SETPOS (LIST (-:CURRENT_SIZE / 2 + (:I * 4)) (-:CURRENT_SIZE / 2 + (:I * 3)))
    PD
    
    ; Slight rotation per pane for a twisting glass look
    RT :I * 0.5
    
    ; Draw the pane
    GLASS_PANE :CURRENT_SIZE (LIST :R :G :B) :CURRENT_WEIGHT
    
    ; Subtle inner detail
    SETPC (LIST (:R * 0.7) (:G * 0.7) (:B * 1.2))
    SETPW :CURRENT_WEIGHT / 3
    REPEAT 8 [
       ARC 45 (:CURRENT_SIZE / 2)
       RT 45
    ]
    
    ; Reset rotation for next calculation
    LT :I * 0.5
  ]
END

Use colour gradients from warm foreground tones to cool background tones, with varying line weights to reinforce the sense of near and far. The overall effect should feel like looking through stacked panes of coloured glass."
Make it as visually compelling and sophisticated as possible.
Return ONLY the Logo code.
baselines.rawResponse:
TO SQUARE :SIZE
REPEAT 4 [FD :SIZE RT 90]
END

TO PANE :SIZE :COL :GR :ROT
PU
SETXY (0 - :SIZE / 2) (0 - :SIZE / 2)
SETHEADING :ROT
PD
SETPC :COL
SETPW :GR
REPEAT 4 [FD :SIZE RT 45 ARC 90 (:SIZE / 10) RT 45]
END

TO RENDER
CS
SETBG 0
HT
MAKE

baselines.taste: Create an illusion of three-dimensional depth using overlapping geometric forms that appear to recede into space. Use colour gradients from warm foreground tones to cool background tones, with varying line weights to reinforce the sense of near and far. The overall effect should feel like looking through stacked panes of coloured glass.
baselines.code:
TO DRAW_PANE :SIZE :R :G :B :W
  SETPW :W
  SETPC (LIST :R :G :B)
  REPEAT 4 [
    FD :SIZE
    RT 90
  ]
  ; Add cross-brace for glass effect
  PU FD :SIZE RT 135 PD
  FD :SIZE * 1.414
  PU BK :SIZE * 1.414 LT 45 PD
  RT 90 PU FD :SIZE LT 135 PD
  FD :SIZE * 1.414
  PU BK :SIZE * 1.414 RT 45 BK :SIZE LT 90 PD
END

TO RENDER_STACK
  CS
  SETBG [5 5 15]
  MAKE "STEPS 75
  MAKE "I 1
  PU SETXY 150 -100 PD
  REPEAT :STEPS [
    ; Gradient logic: 
    ; From Cold/Far: [20, 40, 180] 
    ; To Warm/Near: [255, 80, 20]
    MAKE "CUR_R (20 + (:I * 3.1))
    MAKE "CUR_G (40 + (:I * 0.5))
    MAKE "CUR_B (180 - (:I * 2.1))
    
    ; Weight logic: 
    ; From thin (far) to thick (near)
    MAKE "CUR_W (

TO DEPTH_SCENE
  CS HT SETBG [0 0 15]
  MAKE "LAYERS 45
  REPEAT :LAYERS [
    MAKE "V (REPCOUNT / :LAYERS)
    MAKE "INV (1 - :V)
    ; Calculate colors for receding effect
    MAKE "R 20 + (180 * :INV)
    MAKE "G 10 + (100 * :INV)
    MAKE "B 50 + (205 * :INV)
    
    PU
    SETXY (REPCOUNT * 2) (REPCOUNT * -1)
    SETHEADING (REPCOUNT * 8)
    PD
    
    SETPW (1 + :INV * 3)
    
    ; Drawing overlapping curved layers
    REPEAT 12 [
      SETPC (LIST :R :G :B)
      ARC 120 (300 - (REPCOUNT * 5) - (REPCOUNT * 2))
      RT 30
      PU FD 5 PD
    ]
    
    PU
    SETXY 0 0
    PD
  ]
END

PU
SETXY -250 -250
PD

REPEAT :STEPS [

MAKE "B (REPCOUNT * (255 / :STEPS))

PU

MAKE "SIZE (:SIZE * 0.93)

PD
]

TO GLASS_STACK
  CS HT SETBG 0
  MAKE "SIDE 600
  MAKE "X -300
  MAKE "Y -250
  MAKE "R 255
  MAKE "G 80
  MAKE "B 20
  MAKE "W 14
  
  REPEAT 65 [
    PU SETXY :X :Y PD
    SETPW :W
    SETPC (LIST :R :G :B)
    
    SQUARE :SIDE
    
    MAKE "SIDE :SIDE * 0.94
    MAKE "X :X + (:SIDE * 0.05)
    MAKE "Y :Y + (:SIDE * 0.08)
    
    ; Transition from warm foreground to cool background
    MAKE "R :R - 4
    IF :R < 0 [MAKE "R 0]
    MAKE "G :G + 1
    IF :G > 150 [MAKE "G 150]
    MAKE "B :B + 5
    IF :B > 255 [MAKE "B 255]
    
    ; Decrease line weight to simulate distance
    MAKE "W :W * 0.93
    IF :W < 1 [MAKE "W 1]
    
    ; Slight rotation to enhance the perspective illusion
    RT 0.5
  ]
END

TO RENDER_STACK
  CS
  SETBG [5 5 15]
  PU
  SETXY 50 -50
  PD
  MAKE "STEPS 70
  MAKE "I 1
  REPEAT :STEPS [
    ; Color transition: Deep Blue (Far) to Golden Orange (Near)
    MAKE "RED (20 + (:I * 3.2))
    MAKE "GRN (30 + (:I * 1.8))
    MAKE "BLU (180 - (:I * 2.2))
    
    ; Size and Line Weight increase for depth
    MAKE "S (20 + (:I * 6))
    MAKE "W (0.5 + (:I / 12))
    
    ; Perspective shift
    PU
    SETXY (50 - (:I * 3.5)) (-50 + (:I * 1.5))
    RT 0.5
    PD
    
    ; Draw the pane frame
    GLASS_PANE :S :RED :GRN :BLU :W
    
    ; Add internal refraction line
    PU FD :S * 0.5 RT 90 PD
    GLASS_PANE :S * 0.2 :RED * 0.8 :GRN * 0.8 :BLU * 0.8 :W * 0.5
    PU BK :S * 0.5 LT 90 PD
    
    MAKE "I :I + 1
  ]
END

TO SCENE
  SETBG [5 5 15]
  LOCALMAKE "S 400
  LOCALMAKE "R 0
  LOCALMAKE "H 50
  
  ; Draw background to foreground to create depth
  REPEAT 60 [
    ; Calculate color: deep purples to bright cyans
    LOCALMAKE "RED :H / 2
    LOCALMAKE "GREEN :H / 4
    LOCALMAKE "BLUE 100 + (:H / 2)
    
    ; Add a "glow" by drawing slightly offset layers
    LAYER :S (LIST :RED :GREEN :BLUE) :R
    
    ; Transform for next layer
    LOCALMAKE "S :S * 0.94
    LOCALMAKE "R :R + 7
    LOCALMAKE "H :H + 3
    
    ; Move center slightly to create a curved tunnel effect
    PU
    SETHEADING :R
    FD :S / 40
    PD
  ]
END

TO DRAW_COMPOSITION
  CS HT SETBG [10 10 25]
  MAKE "LAYERS 45
  MAKE "START_SIZE 500
  MAKE "START_WEIGHT 14
  
  REPEAT :LAYERS [
    MAKE "I REPCOUNT
    
    ; Calculate Gradients
    ; Near (Warm): Red/Orange/Yellow
    ; Far (Cool): Deep Blue/Violet/Cyan
    MAKE "R (255 - (:I * 5.5))
    MAKE "G (160 - (:I * 3.5))
    MAKE "B (:I * 5)
    
    IF :R < 0 [MAKE "R 0]
    IF :G < 0 [MAKE "G 0]
    IF :B > 255 [MAKE "B 255]
    
    ; Perspective calculations
    MAKE "CURRENT_SIZE (:START_SIZE * (POWER 0.92 :I))
    MAKE "CURRENT_WEIGHT (:START_WEIGHT * (POWER 0.90 :I))
    
    ; Positioning to create a receding tunnel effect
    PU
    SETPOS (LIST (-:CURRENT_SIZE / 2 + (:I * 4)) (-:CURRENT_SIZE / 2 + (:I * 3)))
    PD
    
    ; Slight rotation per pane for a twisting glass look
    RT :I * 0.5
    
    ; Draw the pane
    GLASS_PANE :CURRENT_SIZE (LIST :R :G :B) :CURRENT_WEIGHT
    
    ; Subtle inner detail
    SETPC (LIST (:R * 0.7) (:G * 0.7) (:B * 1.2))
    SETPW :CURRENT_WEIGHT / 3
    REPEAT 8 [
       ARC 45 (:CURRENT_SIZE / 2)
       RT 45
    ]
    
    ; Reset rotation for next calculation
    LT :I * 0.5
  ]
END
